name: 4FT LED Vapor Tight Light Selectable Wattage & CCT AC 120~277V
description: This 4FT LED vapor tight light delivers a versatile lighting solution with selectable wattage and color temperature options, making it ideal for a wide range of commercial and industrial settings. Optional features such as a motion sensor and emergency backup driver offer added functionality. Engineered for durability and performance, this fixture is both energy-efficient and built to last.
short_desc: Key Features: Selectable Wattages: 40W / 50W / 60W Adjustable Color Temperatures: 3000K / 4000K / 5000K Durable Sealed Design: Liquid silicone perimeter gasket protects against dust and humidity Secure Assembly: Stainless steel clips ensure tight and secure closure IP65 Wet Location Rated: Ideal for damp or wet environments Dimmable: 0-10V dimming support for adjustable lighting control Optional Features: Emergency backup battery and motion sensor available Long Lifespan: Rated for 50,000 hours of reliable operation Certified Quality: ETL & DLC listed for safety and energy compliance Warranty: 5-year manufacturer’s warranty Recommended Applications: LED Retrofit Projects Outdoor Canopies Car Wash Facilities Parking Garages Utility and Maintenance Areas
